top_signals.title: CryptoQuant says Strategy should pause bitcoin purchases and rebuild cash reserves
top_signals.summary: Michael Saylor's Strategy should pause bitcoin purchases and focus on rebuilding its cash reserves, said CryptoQuant.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: Why India Will Stick with America
top_signals.summary:
The Trump administration has not been kind to India. Nevertheless, India has responded with far greater equanimity than most observers expected. Predictions that President Donald Trump’s behavior will hurt U.S.-Indian relations have not come to pass, with the leaders of the two countries remaining in frequent and friendly conversation. Instead of retaliating, India has responded calmly, though the Indian government faces considerable domestic criticism. Despite continuing irritation with American behavior, India can be expected to maintain its two-decade course of seeking good relations with the United States.The reason is a simple one that is ignored by critics and analysts: India

The post Why India Will Stick with America appeared first on War on the Rocks.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Tesla Holders Bet on SpaceX Merger as Musk’s Real Endgame
top_signals.summary: It’s been a challenging year for Tesla Inc. shareholders, losing 15% while watching Elon Musk’s SpaceX complete the biggest initial public offering ever and immediately become the most valuable entity in the newly minted trillionaire’s collection.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Windows 11 KB5095093 update rolls out new Point-in-Time restore feature
top_signals.summary: ​​Microsoft has released the KB5095093 preview cumulative update for Windows 11 24H2 and 25H2, which fixes numerous bugs and begins rolling out new features, including the new Point-in-Time restore feature. [...]
